factors.summary: Demand is decelerating in some segments.

evidence.text: Commercial rental revenue decreased 10% in 2016 due to lower demand.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Evidence shows a clear decline in demand leading to revenue decrease.

factors.summary: The company is successfully raising prices.

evidence.text: Full service lease comparisons benefited from growth in fleet size and higher per-vehicle pricing.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Company successfully raising prices, contributing to revenue growth.

factors.summary: Revenue mix is shifting toward higher-margin segments.

evidence.text: SCS EBT increased 13% in 2016 due to increased revenue.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Shift towards higher-margin segments with increased revenue.

evidence.text: Total revenue increased 6% in 2016 to $1.64 billion and decreased 1% in 2015 to $1.55 billion.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Revenue growth acceleration despite some inconsistencies.

factors.summary: Unit volumes or transaction counts are declining in some segments.

evidence.text: Commercial rental revenue decreased 10% in 2016 reflecting decreased demand.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Declining unit volumes in some segments impacting revenue.

factors.summary: The automotive segment is underperforming while other segments show growth.

evidence.text: SCS EBT increased 21% in 2015 due to increased operating revenue and favorable comparisons to 2014, despite being negatively impacted by lost automotive business.

sentiment.label: neutral
sentiment.rationale: Mixed performance across segments with some growth and underperformance.

factors.summary: Input costs are declining due to lower fuel prices.

evidence.text: Fuel services revenue declined 13% in 2016 due to lower prices passed through to customers.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Declining input costs due to lower fuel prices supporting margins.

evidence.text: FMS EBT decreased 20% in 2016 to $371 million, reflecting lower used vehicle sales results, decreased commercial rental performance and accelerated depreciation on vehicles expected to be made available for sale through June 2018 of $10 million, partially offset by higher full service lease performance and lower overhead costs.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Evidence points to margin compression due to multiple negative factors.

evidence.text: Rental power fleet utilization was 74.7% in 2016, down from 76.5% in 2015, on a 7% smaller average rental power fleet.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Capacity utilization is decreasing, indicating a moderate headwind.

factors.summary: Near-term risks include unfavorable commercial rental comparisons and foreign exchange impacts.

evidence.text: We expect unfavorable commercial rental comparisons next year based on a weaker demand environment. Foreign exchange negatively impacted full service lease revenue growth by 100 basis points.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Unfavorable commercial rental comparisons and foreign exchange impacts pose risks.

factors.summary: Foreign exchange and fuel prices are key sensitivities.

evidence.text: Foreign exchange negatively impacted full service lease revenue growth by 100 basis points. Fuel services revenue declined 13% in 2016 due to lower prices passed through to customers.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Foreign exchange and fuel prices are key sensitivities with negative impacts.

factors.summary: Economic conditions are acting as a headwind.

evidence.text: The overall economic environment is a headwind (expansion, strong GDP) or headwind (slowdown, recession risk) for the company's business.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Economic conditions are acting as a headwind, though the nature isn't specified.

factors.summary: Foreign exchange is negatively impacting results.

evidence.text: Foreign exchange negatively impacted full service lease revenue growth by 100 basis points.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Foreign exchange is negatively impacting results.
